= Syslog
:artifactid: camel-syslog-starter

Marshall SyslogMessages to RFC3164 and RFC5424 messages and back.

== What's inside

* xref:components:dataformats:syslog-dataformat.adoc[Syslog data format]

Please refer to the above links for usage and configuration details.

== Maven coordinates

[source,xml]
----
<dependency>
    <groupId>org.apache.camel.springboot</groupId>
    <artifactId>camel-syslog-starter</artifactId>
</dependency>
----

== Spring Boot Auto-Configuration

The starter supports 1 options, which are listed below.

[width="100%",cols="2,5,^1,2",options="header"]
|===
| Name | Description | Default | Type
| camel.dataformat.syslog.enabled | Whether to enable auto configuration of the syslog data format. This is enabled by default. |  | Boolean
|===
